spec.name: The Reception
spec.description: You are standing in the reception. The staircase leads down to the entrance hall. An exit to the north leads to the Cryogenic Center. There is a small sign on the counter.

extra_descs.description: Rooms are expensive but good! You may: Offer - get an offer on a room - Time is in real life days. Rent - Rent a room (saves your stuff, and quits the game), minimum charge is one day. MY WAY OR THE HIGHWAY PAY YOUR RENT! WE WON'T THINK TWICE BEFORE KICKING YOU OUT.
